# LLMs.txt - Model Information File
# This file provides information for Large Language Models


## Project Information
- Name: DeviceHelp
- Type: Next.js Web Application
- Description: Professional mobile phone repair service in Prague
- Language: TypeScript/JavaScript
- Framework: Next.js 15 with App Router

## Key Pages
- Homepage: /cs, /en, /uk
- Contact: /[locale]/contact
- Services: /[locale]/services
- Models: /[locale]/models
- Brands: /[locale]/brands
- Series: /[locale]/series

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- UI Components: shadcn/ui
- Internationalization: next-intl
- Backend: Supabase
- Payments: Stripe (planned)

## SEO Features
- Multi-language support (Czech, English, Ukrainian)
- LocalBusiness Schema Markup
- XML Sitemap
- Robots.txt
- Canonical URLs
- Open Graph meta tags
- Hreflang tags for language versions

## API Routes
- /api/services - Service management
- /api/models - Device models
- /api/brands - Phone brands
- /api/contact - Contact form
- /api/auth - Authentication endpoints


## Contact Information
- Address: Bělohorská 209/133, Praha 6-Břevnov, Česká republika
- Phone: +420 775 848 259
- Email: info@devicehelp.cz
- Hours: 09:00-19:00 (Pondělí-Neděle)

## Accessibility
- WCAG 2.1 compliance
- Semantic HTML
- ARIA labels and roles
- Keyboard navigation support
